message.content:
@startuml
title start EventLoop
participant "server.activeListener.OnAccept" as server.activeListener.OnAccept
participant "server.newActiveRawConn" as server.newActiveRawConn
participant "server.ContinueFilterChain" as server.ContinueFilterChain
participant "server.activeListener.newConnection" as server.activeListener.newConnection
participant "sever.activeListener.OnNewConnection" as sever.activeListener.OnNewConnection
participant "sever.newActiveConnection" as sever.newActiveConnection
participant "network.connection.Start" as network.connection.Start
participant "network.startRWLoop" as network.startRWLoop
participant "network.attachEventLoop" as network.attachEventLoop

server.activeListener.OnAccept -> server.newActiveRawConn: 创建 filter chain
server.activeListener.OnAccept -> server.ContinueFilterChain: 创建 connection
server.ContinueFilterChain -> server.activeListener.newConnection: 调用 activeListener 的处理新连接事件接口
sever.activeListener.OnNewConnection -> sever.newActiveConnection: 处理新连接事件
sever.activeListener.OnNewConnection -> network.connection.Start: 连接启动
network.connection.Start -> network.startRWLoop: 处理读写时间
network.connection.Start -> network.attachEventLoop: 保存 EventLoop
@enduml
